expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add a notification center with persisted read state and list actions.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state stored across sessions so unread and read items stay consistent after refresh.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification persistence stores read or unread state for each notification.",
        "Stored read state persists across sessions for the same user.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/notification-read-state.*",
        "src/notifications/notification-model.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Show unread badge and notification list",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge and notification list so I can notice updates and review them in one place.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Unread badge reflects current unread notification count.",
        "Notification list opens and shows recent notifications with read-state styling.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/components/unread-badge.*",
        "src/notifications/components/notification-list.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Mark notifications read or unread",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so the list reflects what I have handled already.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Users can mark a notification read or unread from the notification list.",
        "Read-state updates persist immediately after the action completes.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/update-read-state.*",
        "src/notifications/components/notification-row.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Filter notification list by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so I can focus on unread or handled updates.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification list offers all, unread, and read filter options.",
        "Applying a filter updates the list to only matching notifications.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/components/read-state-filter.*",
        "src/notifications/components/notification-list.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so handled updates leave the notification center.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Users can clear all read notifications from notification center controls.",
        "Unread notifications remain after clear completes.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/notifications/clear-read-notifications.*",
        "src/notifications/components/notification-list-toolbar.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
